name: Morning Mix-up
recipeIngredient: 6 Eggs, Salt and Pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the potatoes, ham, and onion in oil for 10 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
2. In a small bowl, beat the eggs, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the egg mixture to the skillet; cook, stirring occasionally, until the eggs are set.
4. Remove from the heat and gently stir in the shredded cheddar cheese.
5. Spoon onto a serving platter and sprinkle with minced fresh chives.
